properties.displayName: Module loads of debugging libraries from user-writable paths
properties.description: Detect image/module load events where common debug / debugging helper DLLs (dbghelp.dll, dbgcore.dll, vsjitdebugger.exe components) are loaded from user-writable locations (Temp, AppData, Downloads) — suspicious for evasion or illicit debugging helpers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (TargetFilename|contains has "dbghelp.dll" or TargetFilename|contains has "dbgcore.dll" or TargetFilename|contains has "vsjitdebugger.exe") and (TargetFilename|contains has "\AppData\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Local\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Temp\" or TargetFilename|contains has "\Downloads\")
